_comment: Agoge Krav Maga — Lindale TX | Built 2026-05-15
HOURS: 4 Nights Per Week — Call for Schedule
HERO SUBHEADLINE: East Texas' Premier Krav Maga Academy in Lindale, TX
HERO SUBTEXT: Serving families, adults, and first responders across Tyler and all of East Texas. Build strength, confidence, and life-saving skills with the Balanced Warrior™ system.
FOUNDING_HEADLINE: East Texas' Trusted Krav Maga Authority
ABOUT_TEXT: At Agoge Krav Maga, we are more than a self-defense academy — we are a mission-driven community dedicated to empowering East Texans with life-saving skills, practical fitness, and unshakable confidence. The Agoge was the ancient training ground for the Spartan warriors. Today, it is the modern-day Balanced Warrior™ training you will receive here. We reject sport-based limitations and focus exclusively on techniques that work in the real world.
INSTRUCTOR_BIO: Asher Lester is a Certified 3rd Degree Black Belt Krav Maga Instructor, Mindfulness Teacher, Breathing Coach, and Behavioral Analyst with a Master of Education. With over 18 years in Behavioral Analysis, Asher's unique Balanced Warrior™ approach blends physical readiness with emotional intelligence — helping East Texans of all ages become strong, resilient, and ready for life's challenges.
TESTIMONIAL 1 QUOTE: Started classes a few months ago and the experience has been really fun and informative. Coaches Trea and Elle are both extremely knowledgeable and accommodating for all levels of experience. They offer flexible class nights 4 nights per week and reasonable monthly pricing. I highly recommend joining up!
TESTIMONIAL 2 QUOTE: My grandkids love this class. Coach Asher really knows how to connect with children. I love how the focus is on de-escalation, not on fighting. However if de-escalation is not possible, my kids are learning how to defend themselves. This is self defense in its purest form. I love it!
TESTIMONIAL 3 QUOTE: I have trained with Trea for years. He has challenged me in more ways than I could ever expect. He has taught me Krav, discipline, nutrition, breathing and de-escalation. Trea is the real deal — a true sensei.
TESTIMONIAL 4 QUOTE: Coaches are great. My son is 5 years old and they're very patient with him — he loves it! Coach Trae and Coach Elle are fantastic instructors. Couldn't be happier.
TESTIMONIAL 5 QUOTE: My 4 year old has been going for about 6 months and he enjoys it very much. Trey and Elle are very patient with him and they always make it fun. It's a great class on self defense!
REVIEWER 1 TEXT: My grandkids love this class. Coach Asher really knows how to connect with children. I love how the focus is on de-escalation not on fighting. However if de-escalation is not possible my kids are learning how to defend themselves. This is self defense in its purest form. No silly bowing to pictures of dead sensei. Just straight forward, in-your-face self defense. I love it!
REVIEWER 2 TEXT: Coaches are great. My son is 5 y/o and they're very patient with him and he loves it! Couldn't be happier with them. Coach Trae and Coach Elle are fantastic instructors and very patient with my son.
REVIEWER 3 TEXT: Coach Asher is very attentive to individuals' needs.
REVIEWER 4 TEXT: Started classes a few months ago and the experience has been really fun and informative. The workouts and lessons are awesome! Coaches Trea and Elle are both extremely knowledgeable and accommodating for all levels of experience, and offer flexible class nights 4 nights per week, and reasonable monthly pricing. I highly recommend joining up!
REVIEWER 5 TEXT: My daughter loves going to class, she has made friends and is learning great things. I highly recommend.
REVIEWER 6 TEXT: I was nervous to attend my first class, but the instructors made me feel at ease and the training is great!
REVIEWER 7 TEXT: My 4 year old has been going for about 6 months and he enjoys it very much. Trey and Elle are very patient with him and they always make it fun for him. It's a great class on self defense.
REVIEWER 8 TEXT: My son takes the teen class. He loves it. Would definitely recommend to anyone interested in martial arts and fitness.
REVIEWER 9 TEXT: Great instructors. Welcoming and great for all levels of learning.
REVIEWER 10 TEXT: I have trained with Trea for years. He has challenged me in more ways than I could ever expect. He has taught me Krav, discipline, nutrition, breathing and de-escalation. Trea is the real deal, a true sensei.
